scripts.render:all: pnpm render:mesh && pnpm render:observer && pnpm render:wire && pnpm render:triptych
scripts.render:new: pnpm render:frame && pnpm render:full && pnpm render:banner && pnpm render:ring
scripts.render:headers: pnpm render:header-morph && pnpm render:header-reel && pnpm render:header-assemble && pnpm render:header-banner
scripts.render:snippets: remotion render S1Problem out/s1-problem.gif --codec=gif --every-nth-frame=3 --scale=0.5 && remotion render S2Shift out/s2-shift.gif --codec=gif --every-nth-frame=3 --scale=0.5 && remotion render S3Modes out/s3-modes.gif --codec=gif --every-nth-frame=3 --scale=0.5 && remotion render S4CrossVendor out/s4-crossvendor.gif --codec=gif --every-nth-frame=3 --scale=0.5 && remotion render S5Topology out/s5-topology.gif --codec=gif --every-nth-frame=3 --scale=0.5 && remotion render S6Logo out/s6-logo.gif --codec=gif --every-nth-frame=3 --scale=0.5
scripts.render:explainer: remotion render ExplainerFull out/explainer-full.mp4 && remotion render ExplainerCore out/explainer-core.mp4
scripts.render:demo-snippets: remotion render S0Headline out/s0-headline.gif --codec=gif --every-nth-frame=3 --scale=0.5 && remotion render S7Command out/s7-command.gif --codec=gif --every-nth-frame=3 --scale=0.5
scripts.render:demos: remotion render DemoLoop out/demo-loop.gif --codec=gif --every-nth-frame=3 --scale=0.5 && remotion render DemoCommand out/demo-command.gif --codec=gif --every-nth-frame=3 --scale=0.5 && remotion render DemoHeadline out/demo-headline.gif --codec=gif --every-nth-frame=3 --scale=0.5 && remotion render DemoShort out/demo-short.gif --codec=gif --every-nth-frame=3 --scale=0.5
scripts.render:demo-codex: remotion render DemoMergedCodex out/demo-merged-codex.mp4 && remotion render DemoMergedCodex out/demo-merged-codex.gif --codec=gif --every-nth-frame=3 --scale=0.5
scripts.render:mix: remotion render DemoCodexRotate out/demo-codex-rotate.gif --codec=gif --every-nth-frame=3 --scale=0.5 && remotion render DemoCodexShuffle out/demo-codex-shuffle.gif --codec=gif --every-nth-frame=3 --scale=0.5
